2605.16726.title: A Global-Local Graph Attention Network for Traffic Forecasting
2605.16726.paper_summary: Traffic forecasting is a significant part of intelligent transportation systems. One of the critical challenges of traffic forecasting is to find spatio-temporal correlations. In recent years, graph convolutional networks and graph attention networks have replaced traditional statistical models to predict future traffic. However, it is complicated for both of them to allow vertices to have far different characters. To address this, we propose the Global-Local Graph Attention Network (GLGAT) with pairwise encoding and the event-based adjacency matrix. The GLGAT allows vertices to have a global attention matrix set for the whole graph and assigns local attention matrix sets to each vertex. Experiments on two real-world traffic datasets show that GLGAT can effectively capture spatio-temporal correlations and has competitive performance against other state-of-the-art baselines.
2605.16726.paper_summary_zh: 交通預測是智慧交通系統的重要組成部分。交通預測的一個關鍵挑戰是找到時空相關性。近年來，圖卷積網絡和圖注意力網絡已取代傳統統計模型來預測未來交通。然而，對於這兩者來說，允許頂點具有截然不同的特性是相當複雜的。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了具有成對編碼和基於事件的鄰接矩陣的全球-局部圖注意力網絡（GLGAT）。GLGAT允許頂點為整個圖設置一個全局注意力矩陣，並為每個頂點分配局部注意力矩陣集。對兩個真實世界交通數據集的實驗表明，GLGAT能有效捕捉時空相關性，並在與其他最先進基準的比較中表現出競爭力。
2605.16726.author: Tianchi Zhang et.al.
